title: UnsubscribeAction
description: A proposed-then-user-confirmed unsubscribe / roll-up / keep decision for a promotional sender, surfaced impulse-spend-first (FR-INB-001). Provided to Shopping (impulse-spend signals) and Tasks. RECOMMEND-NEVER-EXECUTE applies to this consequential non-money action: Inbox proposes, the user confirms via a Confirm-Action sheet, and only then is the unsubscribe attempted and recorded idempotently (Clarifications Q6, FR-X-003 spirit). Inbox NEVER auto-unsubscribes silently. Only sender identity + classification are retained — never raw message bodies (FR-X-013).

action_id.description: Idempotency key. A retried execution MUST NOT re-attempt an already-completed unsubscribe (FR-INB-007).

profile_id.description: Owning user. AuthZ enforced server-side on session identity (Threat Model).

sender_ref.description: Sender IDENTITY + CLASSIFICATION ONLY. No raw email body content is ever carried (FR-INB-001, FR-X-013).

sender_id.description: Stable sender identifier (e.g. normalized from-domain + name).

email_sourced.description: true when this sender data's sole/primary source is the email connection; drives the 7-day revocation deletion cascade (FR-X-013).

action.description: User decision: unsubscribe (attempt removal), roll_up (consolidate into digest), or keep (no change).

impulse_rank.description: Impulse-spend-trigger ranking driving sort order (impulse-first, FR-INB-001). Derived from TransactionStream/MerchantGraph spend signals where available; falls back to a curated heuristic and marks the picture incomplete when absent.

score.description: Decimal-string impulse-spend score (0..1). String-encoded to defeat JSON float coercion (platform wire convention).

signal_source.description: curated_heuristic ⇒ the ranking picture is incomplete (Partial state).

reasoning.description: Bilingual 'why this sender is ranked first' (Constitution VI, FR-X-006). Required so the impulse-first ordering is explainable (SC-I-006).

execution_state.description: Lifecycle. NEVER advances past 'proposed' without explicit user confirmation via a Confirm-Action sheet (recommend-never-execute, Clarifications Q6). 'failed' is retried idempotently with backoff (FR-X-012).

confirmed_at.description: UTC instant the user confirmed (audited, FR-X-007).

audit_ref.description: Append-only audit event id for a confirmed/executed action (FR-INB-008).

freshness.description: Freshness of the sender detection/clean-up scan (source = 'email_parser' or 'derived').
